text:
If a reread text is familiar, this relationship anxiety pattern needs a better reset.

Try this. Name the fact you actually have, name the fear you're adding to it. And ask one direct question instead of guessing. Keep it small enough to finish before your brain starts negotiating.

Bookmark the pattern. Signal, reset, next action. One ambiguous signal is not a verdict on the relationship.
mediaAltText: Faceless vertical short on relationship_anxiety (broll + CosyVoice bank VO)
